full_statement: Every Worker Employed in Coal Mining, Oil and Gas Extraction, Petroleum Refining, or Coal-Fired Power Generation Whose Job Is Eliminated Due to Clean Energy Transition Must Receive 5 Years of Full Wage Replacement, Lifetime Healthcare, and Full Pension Vesting
